code:
import io
import string
import list

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = list.len(parts)

mut best: Int = 0
mut best_abs: Int = 0
mut found = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let tok = match list.get(parts, i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    let a = abs_int(v)
    if not found
      best = v
      best_abs = a
      found = true
    else if a < best_abs
      best = v
      best_abs = a
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best}")
